overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian futuristic city at night. The player moves from an elevated walkway through a covered corridor and engages in combat with enemies in an underpass area, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon-lit city street

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway overlooking the cyberpunk city street below, observing the neon-lit skyline and distant traffic

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
large vertical billboard displaying a pink neon face advertisement
traffic signal showing red light for vehicles below
tall futuristic building with illuminated glass facade
concrete elevated highway structure passing overhead
multi-story building with warm yellow lights in windows

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings, overlooking a dystopian cityscape filled with towering glass skyscrapers and bright neon billboards. Red traffic lights glow in the distance as vehicles move along the street below, while the overcast night sky provides a hazy backdrop to the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with advertisement posters

events.description: enters covered corridor from open elevated walkway
begins descending concrete stairwell at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit covered corridor lined with glowing pink advertisement posters, then descending a concrete stairwell toward street level

entered.detail: concrete wall of the covered pedestrian passage
illuminated poster with pink background and portrait
low concrete ceiling of the covered walkway
linear fluorescent lights along the corridor walls
metal handrail along the descending stairs

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow covered corridor with concrete walls and ceiling, illuminated by artificial lighting and lined with large pink advertisement posters. The environment transitions from the open city view to an enclosed space as the player approaches and begins descending a concrete stairwell at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass street with parked vehicle and NPCs

events.description: exits stairwell into open underpass area at street level
approaching group of NPCs gathered near parked van

agents.ego_description: walking through an underpass area with trash and debris, approaching a group of NPCs standing near a parked van with open doors

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing near the parked van, appearing to rummage through the vehicle

entered.detail: tall metal security fencing along the right side
floating holographic display showing product advertisement
underside of the elevated highway overhead
dark colored van with rear doors open
piles of garbage bags stacked against the wall
concrete staircase leading up to higher level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into a dimly lit underpass, the player finds themselves on a street level area beneath the elevated highway. A holographic advertisement glows nearby, while a group of NPCs congregates around a parked van with its doors open. The area is cluttered with trash bags and graffiti-covered concrete walls, creating a gritty urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat zone under overpass with hostile NPCs

events.description: engages in close-quarters combat with hostile NPCs near the parked van
defeated enemies fall to the ground, combat concludes

agents.ego_description: engaging in melee combat with hostile NPCs, defeating them near the parked van under the overpass

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC in purple outfit attacking the player with melee weapon
hostile NPC in green outfit engaging in combat

segments.scene_description: The player engages in fast-paced combat with hostile NPCs in the underpass area. The enemies, dressed in colorful cyberpunk outfits, attack near the parked van but are quickly defeated and fall to the asphalt. The combat takes place in the confined space beneath the overpass, with the metal fences and concrete walls framing the violent encounter.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-combat underpass area with debris and ascending stairs

events.description: combat ends, player begins ascending stairs away from combat zone

agents.ego_description: walking past defeated enemies and ascending concrete stairs, exploring the underpass area with trash and debris

entered.detail: concrete seating benches along the walkway
illuminated sign with 'EL GUAPO' text
large pile of garbage bags and debris

segments.scene_description: After the combat concludes, the player explores the aftermath in the underpass, walking past the bodies of defeated enemies lying on the concrete. The player ascends a set of concrete stairs, revealing more details including concrete benches, piles of trash bags, and a neon sign reading 'EL GUAPO' visible through the metal fencing. The player continues moving through the gritty urban environment toward the street beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an expansive elevated vista into the gritty, claustrophobic depths of a city underpass. It begins on a pedestrian walkway overlooking a dystopian cityscape of towering glass skyscrapers and glowing neon billboards under a hazy night sky. As the camera moves forward, the open view vanishes into a narrow covered corridor lined with pink advertisement posters, leading the player down a concrete stairwell. The scene then opens into a dimly lit underpass beneath a highway, where the environment shifts to a cluttered street level filled with graffiti and holographic ads, culminating in a violent combat encounter with hostile NPCs near a parked van. Finally, the camera drifts past the defeated enemies and ascends another set of stairs, passing concrete benches and a neon El Guapo sign before heading back toward the urban street.
